tluaNotCallableErrors.tlua(6,1): error TLUA2349: This expression is not callable.
  Type 'Number' has no call signatures.
tluaNotCallableErrors.tlua(9,1): error TLUA2349: This expression is not callable.
  Type '{}' has no call signatures.


==== tluaNotCallableErrors.tlua (2 errors) ====
    // Calling a value with no call signatures must error. TypeScript's
    // "untyped call" escape hatch keyed on assignability to the global Function
    // interface — an empty stub in this fork (since deleted outright), so every
    // value was Function-assignable and not-callable errors vanished.
    local notCallable = 1;
    notCallable();
    ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2349: This expression is not callable.
!!! error TLUA2349:   Type 'Number' has no call signatures.
    
    local emptyObject = {};
    emptyObject();
    ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2349: This expression is not callable.
!!! error TLUA2349:   Type '{}' has no call signatures.
    
    
    declare untypedValue: any;
    untypedValue(); // any stays callable
